assays.assay_desc: Inhibition of N-terminal GST-tagged human TGTB (696 to end residues) expressed in baculovirus infected Sf21 cells using poly (Glu,Tyr)4:1 as substrate preincubated for 10 mins followed by substrate addition measured after 1 hr by fluorescence polarization assay

Inhibition of N-terminal GST-tagged recombinant human TGTB T790M mutant expressed in baculovirus infected Sf21 cells using poly (Glu,Tyr)4:1 as substrate preincubated for 10 mins followed by substrate addition measured after 1 hr by fluorescence polarization assay

Kinobeads (epsilon), multiple immobilized ATP-competitive broad spectrum kinase inhibitors, used to assess residual binding of ~300 proteins simultaneously from cell lysate in the presence of a compound. Quantitative readout performed by mass spectrometry.
Inhibition of GST-tagged human TGTB catalytic domain expressed in insect cells
